title: fix: remove deprecated content and toolInvocations from MastraMessageContentV2

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: refactor(core): modularize MessageList class into specialized components
similarOrDuplicatePRs.relationship: The MessageList was heavily refactored in #11658, but the deprecated fields (content, toolInvocations, reasoning, annotations, experimental_attachments) on MastraMessageContentV2 were NOT removed. The refactored code still uses toolInvocations in MessageMerger.ts and tests. This PR's goal is still relevant but the code has diverged significantly.

summary: Removes deprecated fields (content, toolInvocations, reasoning, experimental_attachments, annotations) from MastraMessageContentV2 type, consolidating all message data into the parts array to align with AI SDK v5. Adds a MastraMessageContentV2WithDeprecated type for backward-compatible migration of old DB records. Updates 59 files across core, storage adapters, processors, and tests to read/write exclusively from the parts array. Includes a migration helper that converts deprecated fields into proper parts entries.
maintainerNotes: This PR has been stale for ~125 days with merge conflicts and changes requested by TylerBarnes (empty review body). The codebase has undergone major refactoring since (#11658 modularized MessageList into ~15 separate files), making this PR unmergeable without a complete rewrite. However, the underlying goal is still valid — MastraMessageContentV2 on main still carries the deprecated fields (content, toolInvocations, reasoning, annotations, experimental_attachments) and toolInvocations is still actively used in MessageMerger.ts. If this cleanup is still desired, it should be redone as a fresh PR against the current codebase. Missing changesets. Close and track as a future task, or reopen as a new PR.
